visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black oversized T-shirt with the white text 'HAHABABY' and denim shorts, stands in a bright white room. She holds the T-shirt out in front of her to display its size and logo. Behind her is a window with natural light and a wooden cabinet. (2) The woman transitions to wearing a cream-colored 'HAHABABY' T-shirt over a white lace skirt and long white mesh sleeves. She holds a small basket filled with orange and yellow artificial flowers while smiling at the camera in a room with a grey sofa and wooden dresser. (3) She appears in a casual outfit, wearing the same cream T-shirt paired with white wide-leg jeans and a light green baseball cap. She demonstrates a styling trick by using a black rubber band to tie a side knot on the shirt's hem, tucking the knot inward to shorten the garment. (4) The woman now wears the cream T-shirt layered over a blue striped long-sleeved shirt and a denim mini-skirt. She wears a brown cap and her hair is styled in two low ponytails. She ties small knots on both sides of the shirt's hem using rubber bands to create a layered, preppy look. (5) In an edgy style, she wears a black 'HAHABABY' T-shirt over black mesh sleeves and wide-leg denim jeans with white stitching. She wears a black beanie with a small white graphic. She poses with her arms crossed, showing off the textured sleeves. (6) For the final look, she wears the black T-shirt with denim shorts and a black beret. She has a light blue sweater draped diagonally across her chest and tied over one shoulder. She tucks a small portion of the shirt hem into her shorts to create an asymmetrical silhouette. (7) The video concludes with a rapid montage of all five previous outfits, showing the woman posing and smiling in each different style against the same indoor background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 今天想跟大家分享一下這種大T-shirt要怎麼穿才不會沒精神才不會無聊. [Variety]: T-shirt穿搭. [Slogan]: 有精神. 有層次. 一件多穿. (2) [Variety]: 第一套 仙女風. [Subtitle]: 可以加一件蕾絲內搭. 然後再把這種蛋糕裙襯在裡面. 就會有一種仙女感. (3) [Variety]: 第二套 休閒風. [Subtitle]: 寬寬大大的. 你把這個橡皮筋. 綁頭髮的橡皮筋. 然後把旁邊紮起來. 收進去. 然後如果這邊太長的話. 也可以把它折起來. 就可以了. (4) [Variety]: 第三套 學院風. [Subtitle]: 學院風. 你在裡面襯一件那個薄襯衫在裡面. 然後呢. 衣服的話就是一樣拿出橡皮筋. 把兩邊都綁一點點起來. 一點點就好. 不用像剛剛要捲起來綁這麼多. 兩邊都一點點. 然後捲起來. 整理一下. (5) [Variety]: 第四套 酷妹風. [Subtitle]: 最簡單的就是. 你可以再挑比你原本穿的尺寸再更大一點. 然後裡面襯一個像我挑黑色. 我裡面就襯一個那個黑色的網紗. 然後帶個毛帽. 就是帥帥的感覺. (6) [Variety]: 第五套 夏日風. [Subtitle]: 這個大T-shirt呢. 你就稍微邊邊紮一點點進去. 就是留他的鬆弛感. 然後把一件那個長袖的隨便外套什麼的. 斜斜的綁. 這樣搭起來就可以.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator demonstrating the outfits throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, often styled in ponytails or covered by hats. She wears various outfits centered around oversized 'HAHABABY' brand T-shirts in black and cream colors.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist indoor setting with white walls, a grey fabric sofa, a dark wooden dresser with a small yellow cushion on top, and a window reflecting outdoor greenery.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female voice speaks in an enthusiastic and rapid tone, introducing a fashion styling guide. Upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop music with a prominent synthesized beat begins in the background. The audio quality is crisp with a clear frequency balance. (2) The voice continues at a high speech rate, detailing the 'fairy style' outfit. Each instructional point is punctuated by the rhythmic pulse of the BGM. Minimal ambient noise is present. (3) A new phase is triggered by the transition to the 'casual style.' The speaker's pitch variability increases as she explains the rubber band technique. Short 'pop' sound effects emphasize the visual changes. (4) As the 'preppy style' is introduced, the vocal delivery remains clear and well-articulated. The BGM maintains a consistent major-mode tonality, providing a cheerful and energetic acoustic backdrop. (5) The speaker describes the 'cool girl' look with a confident and assertive tone. The music's percussive elements remain strong, driving the auditory rhythm of the video. (6) For the 'summer style' segment, the vocal arousal level remains high. Subtle rustling sounds from fabric manipulation are barely audible under the dominant speech and music layers. (7) The narration concludes as the music continues through a rapid visual montage. The BGM reaches a final cadence and the audio track ends with a clean hard cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Tutorial (5 Methods) -> Montage Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide practical fashion styling tips for oversized T-shirts while promoting the 'HAHABABY' apparel brand. By demonstrating five distinct aesthetic styles (Fairy, Casual, Preppy, Cool, and Summer), the creator showcases the versatility of the brand's products to inspire viewers and encourage brand engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The brand logo 'HAHABABY' is prominently displayed on all featured clothing items, and the video focuses entirely on styling these specific pieces.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The creator uses high-energy delivery and clear visual demonstrations to effectively communicate fashion tips in a short-form format.
